## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation / Chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm type-check` passes
- [ ] `pnpm astro check` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` succeeds
- [ ] New config fields synced to `kirari.config.toml`, `src/types/config.ts`, and `README.md`
- [ ] Commit follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] No unrelated changes mixed in

## Related Issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## What Changed

<!-- Concrete, not vague. What was the problem? What did you change? Why this approach? -->

## Verification

<!-- How did you confirm this works? Commands run, screenshots if UI change. -->
